perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of an iPhone with a Corgi wallpaper resting on a white knitted texture; a person's hand enters and taps the screen. (2) A white charging cable is inserted into the phone, causing the screen to light up and display 'Charging' along with the current percentage. (3) The camera zooms into the Dynamic Island area, which briefly shows a status heart icon and then a text string indicating time remaining to reach 80% charge. (4) The scene transitions to the phone's Settings app, where the user navigates to the 'Battery' section to display the detailed charging estimation graph and text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A rhythmic, upbeat, and mellow lofi hip-hop track begins immediately and plays throughout the video. (2) Clear digital sound effects (SFX) are heard, including the iPhone's signature charging chime and haptic-like click sounds during screen interactions. (3) No vocals or speech are detected at any point in the recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'iOS18讓你沒有充電🔋焦慮' (iOS18 relieves your charging anxiety), appearing in a bold white font at the bottom. (2) Functional Text: '開始充電' (Start charging), indicating the action being performed. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '仔細看動態島下面有出現充電多久即可80%' (Look closely, it shows how long to reach 80% below the Dynamic Island). (4) Functional Text: '設定裡電池那邊也會顯示！' (It's also shown in the Battery settings!), used as a concluding tip.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Hardware Interaction -> Feature Zoom-in -> Settings Verification

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One adult male hand is visible throughout the video interacting with the smartphone.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with short, clean nails and fair skin, performing technical interactions.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A white, chunky-knit blanket or sweater provides a soft, textured background for the phone.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft, diffused natural light or studio key light focusing on the device screen.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Action -> Observation -> Secondary Proof
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate a specific feature of iOS 18 that provides an estimated time to reach an 80% charge level, positioning it as a tool to mitigate range anxiety for iPhone users. The video combines physical interaction with software UI exploration to provide a complete tutorial of where to find the feature.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Positive framing of software features ('relieves anxiety') and demonstration of the latest smartphone hardware/OS.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-quality tech close-up aesthetic with textural backgrounds.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets Apple enthusiasts and early adopters looking for hidden iOS 18 features. The use of a cute pet wallpaper is a common engagement tactic for tech vloggers.
